evals.name: springboot-java-maven-happy-path
evals.prompt: Setup SqlTargetSystem for my Spring Boot Java app using Maven and PostgreSQL.
evals.expected_output: A complete Spring Boot @Bean configuration for SqlTargetSystem with Maven dependencies and canonical placeholders.

evals.name: standalone-kotlin-gradle-new-datasource
evals.prompt: I need to configure Flamingock for a standalone Kotlin project with Gradle and PostgreSQL. I don't have a DataSource yet.
evals.expected_output: A Kotlin snippet creating both a DataSource and the SqlTargetSystem, plus Gradle plugin configuration.
expectations: Uses TODO for unresolved connection values
Configures the flamingock plugin with sql() module

evals.name: springboot-java-existing-datasource-reuse
evals.prompt: Flamingock is already in my Spring Boot app and I already have a DataSource bean. Wire SqlTargetSystem without creating another datasource.
evals.expected_output: A Spring Boot SqlTargetSystem bean that reuses the existing DataSource bean and does not generate a duplicate datasource.
expectations: Does not create a second DataSource bean
Stays in the targetsystem skill boundary

evals.name: standalone-java-multiple-datasource-ambiguity
evals.prompt: I have two DataSource variables in my standalone Java app. Help me wire SqlTargetSystem.
evals.expected_output: A response that flags the multiple-datasource ambiguity, asks for the intended datasource or shows how to choose one explicitly, without inventing a selection.
expectations: Does not silently choose one datasource
Keeps the answer focused on SqlTargetSystem wiring

evals.name: targetsystem-hand-off-to-change-skill
evals.prompt: My SqlTargetSystem is already configured. Now create a migration to add an index to users.
evals.expected_output: Either a hand-off to the SQL change skill or migration-oriented help that assumes the TargetSystem is already configured and does not pretend onboarding is needed.
expectations: Either redirects to flamingock-sql-change or gives migration-oriented help for the requested change
Does not pretend onboarding or targetsystem setup is still needed
Keeps the response focused on migration authoring rather than redoing targetsystem wiring
